events.description: 4th grade field trip to science museum with guided tour and planetarium show

events.title: 4th Grade Science Museum Field Trip
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description: Field trip to California Science Museum on Thursday, March 12, 2026. Depart school at 8:30 AM (bus). Arrive at museum at 9:30 AM. Guided tour & exhibits 9:30-11:30 AM. Lunch 11:30 AM-12:15 PM (bring bag lunch). Planetarium show & free exploration 12:15-1:30 PM. Depart museum at 2:00 PM. Return to school at 3:00 PM (regular dismissal). Cost: $15 per student (payment deadline March 5, 2026). Permission form required by March 5th.
